candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related amortization line shown separately from the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value'. The total 'Cost of goods sold' equals the balancing value plus this row and 'Depreciation in COR/COGS', so this D&A is outside the selected balancing bucket and should be added separately.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value'. The explicit COGS D&A rows sit outside that balancing row and reconcile to the full 'Cost of goods sold' total, so they should be added separately.

This appears to be a component of the selected row 'Selling and administrative costs': that selected row equals selling-expense components including this amortization and 'Depreciation in selling expense'. Therefore adding it separately would double count.

This appears to be a component of the selected row 'Selling and administrative costs': that selected row equals selling-expense components including this depreciation and 'Amortization in selling expense'. Therefore adding it separately would double count.

This administrative D&A line appears outside the selected row 'Administrative expenses - Balancing value'. The full 'Administrative expenses' exceeds the balancing value, and this depreciation is one of the excluded components, so it should be added separately relative to the selected XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Selling and administrative costs' and 'Administrative expenses - Balancing value'. Selling-expense D&A appears embedded in the selected 'Selling and administrative costs' row, so it is not added. 'Depreciation in administrative expense' appears outside the selected administrative balancing row and should be added separately.
